canonical_answer: A woman with long dark brown hair sits on light gray fabric couch cushions. She wears a black denim jacket featuring a red sequined heart patch on the right shoulder. A thin gold necklace with a small pendant rests around her neck. A white lower-third graphic displays text in the bottom left corner.

question: Describe what is happening in the cityscape view with religious buildings?
canonical_answer: Four tall tan stone minarets with crescent moon finials stand near a large turquoise dome. A white church bell tower with a gold cross on top and a clock face rises nearby. Dense beige and white mid-rise buildings fill the background under a pale orange and pink sky. Text overlays appear in the center and bottom left corner.

question: Describe the visual progression of the introductory sequence including text overlays and architectural shifts.
canonical_answer: At 0s, text about the Beirut explosion overlays a coastal cityscape; at 4s, the text vanishes revealing dense urban buildings; at 8s, minarets and a church tower appear with location text; at 10s, the camera highlights religious architecture against the sunset sky.

question: Outline the sequence of events starting from the title card until the driving scene begins.
canonical_answer: At 14s, the title GENERATION 17 displays over rippling ocean water; at 15s, the name Nadine Khaouli appears beneath the main text; at 18s, the view switches to a woman driving a car; at 19s, construction cranes and pink blossoms are visible through the windows.
